form.formComment: Won over this track and trip. Last start finished last over 488m at Mandurah beaten 11 lengths (28.39) behind Trust Me in a Grade 4/5 on April 10. Should prove hard to beat.

form.formComment: Didn't make the placings last time at Mandurah (38.22) in a Grade 4/5, finishing a 6 length sixth. Fairly consistent record from the draw including a win and nine minors. Has ability and should feature.

form.formComment: Strong performance after tracking the speed to win by 2 lengths at this track over 601m (34.79) beating Our Girl Jess in Grade 5 on April 11. Has run a slick time here with a 34.59 PB at the distance. Worth including.

form.formComment: Talented type with an excellent strike rate at this journey. Has been prominent in the run and duly saluted at his last couple, most recently over 601m at this track in a handy 34.58 beating Hum Bug Monelli. Looks well placed to make it three straight.
